title: Real-time PCR Detection of Fusarium oxysporum f. sp. cubense Tropical Race 4 from Banana Plant Tissues
author: Merahflor Cavite
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Foc  TR4 is currently a major concern to banana industry globally. Once it is present in an area, total eradication is difficult. Monitoring of the pathogen as basis for disease management requires a rapid and reliable tool for early and accurate detection to prevent further spread. This study describes a rapid and efficient molecular diagnostic tool, Real-Time PCR, for detecting  Foc  TR4 from plant tissues.
steps_raw: Foc  TR4 is currently a major concern to banana industry globally. Once it is present in an area, total eradication is difficult.
